character.name: arjun_chef
character.prompt: A chibi adult male chef with long wavy black hair and a short beard. He wears a black Indian-style kurta chef uniform with vivid orange-gold embroidery and golden shoulder ornaments (orange color #ff8800). Wears a black and gold traditional turban (pagri) instead of a chef hat. Golden eyes. Intense and dignified spice master appearance. Holds a small mortar or spice grinder. Low top-down view, 8 directions, chibi proportions.
